textPlain: Why would anyone look up to Jony Ive? He was never a good designer. He made stuff thin…

I have no horse in the race regarding who _should_ be emulated. But Jony Ive is maybe the single most famous designer to live, so I’m certain people look up to him for that at the very least. Actually I don’t think I can even name another “designer“. Does Andy Warhol count? Maybe Frank Herbert Wright?
